overview: CRIB 1 HEIGHT ADJUSTABLE BABY CRIB Antibacterial electrostatic powder painted frame. Easy cleanable surface. Height adjustment by gas spring pedal. Reverse Trendelenburg position with multiple angles up to 10 degrees. Antibacterial, transparent, Plexiglas bassinet. Pushing bar at head side. Antibacterial mattress with high density of 22 kg/m3. Lower basket for newborn baby’s belongings. 360o Swivel, diagonal lockable castors.
